title: Fishing For Stars
description: Faithful recreation of Stardew Valley's fishing minigame
body:
## **Recreates the fishing minigame from [Stardew Valley](https://store.steampowered.com/app/413150/Stardew_Valley/) into Minecraft!**
![A colourful logo showing the text "Fishing for Stars"](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ef98ce5c7852d478ae6ee95fe4ccee8254668c39.png)
**Fishing For Stars** replaces vanilla's boring fishing, with an addictive minigame straight from the valley!
![Fishing minigame](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/11ad0f18630cf8c2f85f0df7034179fc5c48a9c7.gif)

## Features
- A new **minigame**, with textures and sounds
- A new **item**, to see what you're about to catch
- Randomly generated **loot chests**, as a suprise
- Varied **difficulty**, depending on the item
- A **tutorial**, with support for 7 different languages 
- Multiplayer compatibility


## Rights
- All relevant assets and concepts belong to ConcernedApe
- All code belongs to Juyoh
- This project uses the MIT license
